value: Pushing any v* tag fires the full release workflow including update-homebrew (which only needs the `release` job to succeed). Debug-style tag pushes (e.g. v0.0.0-debug.0) will reach the Homebrew step and push a formula commit to seabearDEV/homebrew-ccli — no skip mechanism. Practical workaround: accept the cleanup, the next real prerelease overwrites the bogus formula. Surfaced during #96's debug-tag rerun where commit 59058ca on the tap was a side effect we let self-correct rather than reverting. If you need a truly side-effect-free release-workflow rerun, use a non-`v*` tag pattern or temporarily edit the workflow trigger on the debug branch.
